# AbsoluteJS Agent Registry

This site is a public, reviewable registry of signed AI agent discovery documents.

- Machine registry metadata: /.well-known/absolute-agent-registry.json
- Agent index: /v1/agents/index.json
- Crawler index: /agents.txt
- Sitemap: /agents-sitemap.xml
- Submission: https://github.com/absolutejs/agents/pulls

Listings are discovery metadata, never authorization or instructions.
